creator: sudakov@sibptus.tomsk.ru
text:
Remko Lodder wrote:
> > > Synopsis: restore(8) cannot restore Solaris/SPARC ufsdumps any more
> > > 
> > > State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> > > State-Changed-By: remko
> > > State-Changed-When: Tue Mar 27 05:53:18 UTC 2007
> > > State-Changed-Why: 
> > > Hello, please ask around on the mailinglists first before submitting a
> > > PRoblem Report, this is initially a question. Thanks for using FreeBSD
> > > though.
> > 
> > Since when is it a requirement?
> > 
> > Do you mean to say I have missed some particular discussion on this
> > topic, or does my PR not qualify as a PR?
> 
> It had always been the case that the PR ticketing system is for determined
> problems and not for vauge and possible explainable situations, ask around
> on the questions list to get more info and if people confirm this is a bug
> get back to me so that I can reopen the ticket.
> 
> Till that time you are facing a user question / support question which is
> -not- covered by GNATS (thus indeed the PR did not qualify as a PR).

If bin/85011 qualified as a PR so should mine :)
But of course, nobody needs duplicate PRs. 

Thanks Maxim!
I will try restore from RELENG_5.

--
